description: This is a Java source file defining the MfaService class, responsible for issuing and verifying MFA codes within the authentication system of the application.

classes.name: MfaService
classes.description: Service class that handles creation and verification of MFA challenges and OTPs, using secure random generation, cryptography, and repository persistence.

methods.name: createChallenge
methods.description: Generates a new MFA OTP, stores its hash in the database with an expiry, and logs the OTP for MVP delivery purposes.

methods.name: verifyLatestChallenge
methods.description: Verifies the provided OTP against the latest unconsumed challenge for the user, marking it as consumed if successful.
